moves.name: Focus Punch
moves.description: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. It will fail if the user is hit before it is used.

moves.name: Dragon Claw
moves.description: The user slashes the target with huge, sharp claws.

moves.name: Water Pulse
moves.description: The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. It may also confuse the target.

moves.name: Calm Mind
moves.description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

moves.name: Roar
moves.description: The target is scared off and replaced by another Pokémon in its party. In the wild, the battle ends.

moves.name: Toxic
moves.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

moves.name: Snowscape
moves.description: Summons a five-turn snowstorm that boosts the Defense of Ice-type Pokémon.

moves.name: Bulk Up
moves.description: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting both its Attack and Defense stats.

moves.name: Bullet Seed
moves.description: The user forcefully shoots seeds at the target. Two to five seeds are shot in rapid succession.

moves.name: Work Up
moves.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase.

moves.name: Sunny Day
moves.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type moves.

moves.name: Taunt
moves.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

moves.name: Ice Beam
moves.description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. It may also freeze the target solid.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike the opposing team. It may also freeze them solid.

moves.name: Hyper Beam
moves.description: The foe is attacked with a powerful beam. The user must rest on the next turn to regain its energy.

moves.name: Light Screen
moves.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to suppress damage from special attacks for five turns.

moves.name: Protect
moves.description: It enables the user to evade all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

moves.name: Rain Dance
moves.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type moves.

moves.name: Giga Drain
moves.description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

moves.name: Safeguard
moves.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status problems for five turns.

moves.name: Dazzling Gleam
moves.description: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

moves.name: Solar Beam
moves.description: A two-turn attack. The user gathers light, then blasts a bundled beam on the second turn.

moves.name: Iron Tail
moves.description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. It may also lower the target's Defense stat.

moves.name: Thunderbolt
moves.description: A strong electric blast is loosed at the target. It may also leave the target with paralysis.

moves.name: Thunder
moves.description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the foe to inflict damage. It may also leave the target paralyzed.

moves.name: Earthquake
moves.description: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

moves.name: Low Sweep
moves.description: The user attacks the target's legs swiftly, reducing the target's Speed stat.

moves.name: Dig
moves.description: The user burrows, then attacks on the second turn. It can also be used to exit dungeons.

moves.name: Psychic
moves.description: The target is hit by a strong telekinetic force. It may also reduce the target's Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.description: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the target. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Brick Break
moves.description: The user attacks with a swift chop. It can also break any barrier such as Light Screen and Reflect.

moves.name: Double Team
moves.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to raise its evasiveness.

moves.name: Reflect
moves.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to suppress damage from physical attacks for five turns.

moves.name: Shockwave
moves.description: The user strikes the target with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack cannot be evaded.

moves.name: Flamethrower
moves.description: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. It may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Sludge Bomb
moves.description: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target. It may also poison the target.

moves.name: Sandstorm
moves.description: Summons a five-turn sandstorm to hurt all combatants except the Rock, Ground, and Steel types.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.description: The foe is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. It may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Rock Tomb
moves.description: Boulders are hurled at the target. It also lowers the target's Speed by preventing its movement.

moves.name: Aerial Ace
moves.description: The user confounds the foe with speed, then slashes. The attack lands without fail.

moves.name: Torment
moves.description: The user torments and enrages the foe, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.

moves.name: Facade
moves.description: An attack move that doubles its power if the user is poisoned, burned, or has paralysis.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

moves.name: Rest
moves.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. It fully restores the user's HP and heals any status problem.

moves.name: Attract
moves.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the target becomes infatuated and less likely to attack.

moves.name: Thief
moves.description: The user attacks and steals the foe's held item simultaneously. It can't steal if the user holds an item.

moves.name: Steel Wing
moves.description: The target is hit with wings of steel. It may also raise the user's Defense stat.

moves.name: Skill Swap
moves.description: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

moves.name: Scald
moves.description: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. It may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Overheat
moves.description: The user attacks the target at full power. The attack's recoil sharply reduces the user's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Roost
moves.description: The user lands and rests its body. It restores the user's HP by up to half of its max HP.

moves.name: Focus Blast
moves.description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def.

moves.name: Energy Ball
moves.description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def.

moves.name: False Swipe
moves.description: A restrained attack that prevents the target from fainting. The target is left with at least 1 HP.

moves.name: Brine
moves.description: If the target's HP is down to about half, this attack will hit with double the power.

moves.name: Fling
moves.description: The user flings its held item at the target to attack. Its power and effects depend on the item.

moves.name: Charge Beam
moves.description: The user fires a concentrated bundle of electricity. It may also raise the user's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Endure
moves.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

moves.name: Dragon Pulse
moves.description: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user's gaping mouth.

moves.name: Drain Punch
moves.description: An energy-draining punch. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

moves.name: Will-o-wisp
moves.description: The user shoots a sinister, bluish-white flame at the target to inflict a burn.

moves.name: Bug Buzz
moves.description: The user vibrates its wings to generate a damaging sound wave. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Nasty Plot
moves.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. It sharply raises the user's Sp. Atk.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.description: The user slashes with a sharp claw made from shadows. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Payback
moves.description: If the user moves after the target, this attack's power will be doubled.

moves.name: Recycle
moves.description: The user recycles a held item that has been used in battle so it can be used again.

moves.name: Giga Impact
moves.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user must rest on the next turn.

moves.name: Rock Polish
moves.description: The user polishes its body to reduce drag. It can sharply raise the Speed stat.

moves.name: Stone Edge
moves.description: The user stabs the foe with sharpened stones from below. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

moves.name: Flash
moves.description: The user flashes a light that cuts the target's accuracy. It can also be used to illuminate caves.

moves.name: Avalanche
moves.description: An attack move that inflicts double the damage if the user has been hurt by the foe in the same turn.

moves.name: Thunderwave
moves.description: A weak electric charge is launched at the target. It causes paralysis if it hits.

moves.name: Gyro Ball
moves.description: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user, the greater the damage.

moves.name: Sword's Dance
moves.description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. It sharply raises the user's Attack stat.

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the foe. The trap hurts foes that switch into battle.

moves.name: Psych Up
moves.description: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

moves.name: Snarl
moves.description: The user yells as if it is ranting about something, making the target's Sp. Atk stat decrease.

moves.name: Dark Pulse
moves.description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Rock Slide
moves.description: Large boulders are hurled at the foes to inflict damage. It may also make the targets flinch.

moves.name: X-Scissor
moves.description: The user slashes at the foe by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

moves.name: Sleep Talk
moves.description: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

moves.name: Bulldoze
moves.description: The user strikes everything around it by stomping on the ground. It reduces hit Pokémon's Speed.

moves.name: Poison Jab
moves.description: The target is stabbed with a tentacle or arm seeped with poison. It may also poison the target.

moves.name: Dream Eater
moves.description: The user eats the dreams of a sleeping foe. It absorbs half the damage caused to heal the user's HP.

moves.name: Grass Knot
moves.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the damage.

moves.name: Swagger
moves.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, it also sharply raises the target's Attack stat.

moves.name: Pluck
moves.description: The user pecks the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

moves.name: U-Turn
moves.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

moves.name: Substitute
moves.description: The user makes a copy of itself using some of its HP. The copy serves as the user's decoy.

moves.name: Flash Cannon
moves.description: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Trick Room
moves.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which slower Pokémon get to move first for five turns.

moves.name: Cut
moves.description: The target is cut with a scythe or a claw. It can also be used to cut down thin trees.

moves.name: Fly
moves.description: The user soars, then strikes on the second turn. It can also be used for flying to any familiar town.

moves.name: Surf
moves.description: It swamps the area around the user with a giant wave. It can also be used for crossing water.

moves.name: Strength
moves.description: The target is slugged with a punch thrown at maximum power. It can also be used to move heavy boulders.

moves.name: Defog
moves.description: A strong wind blows away the foe's obstacles such as Light Screen. It also lowers their evasion.

moves.name: Rock Smash
moves.description: The user attacks with a punch that can shatter a rock. It may also lower the foe's Defense stat.

moves.name: Waterfall
moves.description: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch. It can also be used to climb a waterfall.

moves.name: Dive
moves.description: Diving on the first turn, the user rises and hits on the next turn. It can be used to dive in the ocean.

moves.name: Rock Climb
moves.description: The user attacks the target by smashing into it with incredible force. It may also confuse the target.

moves.name: Return
moves.description: A full-power attack that grows more powerful the more the user likes its Trainer.

moves.name: Frustration
moves.description: A full-power attack that grows more powerful the less the user likes its Trainer.

moves.name: Grassy Terrain
moves.description: The user turns the ground to grass for five turns. Grounded Pokémon restore a little HP every turn.

moves.name: Electric Terrain
moves.description: The user electrifies the ground for five turns. Pokémon on the ground no longer fall asleep.

moves.name: Psychic Terrain
moves.description: Protects grounded Pokémon from priority moves and powers up Psychic-type moves for five turns.

moves.name: Misty Terrain
moves.description: The user covers the ground with mist for five turns. Grounded Pokémon can't gain status conditions.

moves.name: Hidden Power
moves.description: A unique attack that varies in type and intensity depending on the Pokémon using it.

moves.name: Sand Tomb
moves.description: The user traps the target inside a harshly raging sandstorm for four to five turns.

moves.name: Swift
moves.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at the opposing team. This attack never misses.

moves.name: Stomping Tantrum
moves.description: The user attacks driven by frustration. Power increases if the user's previous move failed.

moves.name: Acrobatics
moves.description: The user nimbly strikes the foe. This attack does more damage if the user is not holding an item.

moves.name: Heat Wave
moves.description: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on the opposing team. It may also leave targets with a burn.

moves.name: Helping Hand
moves.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of its attack.

moves.name: Hone Claws
moves.description: The user sharpens its claws to boost its Attack stat and accuracy.

moves.name: Close Combat
moves.description: The user fights the foe up close without guarding itself. It also cuts the user's Defense and Sp. Def.

moves.name: Mega Punch
moves.description: The target is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.

moves.name: Mega Kick
moves.description: The target is attacked by a kick launched with muscle-packed power.

moves.name: Uproar
moves.description: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. Over that time, no one can fall asleep.

moves.name: Venoshock
moves.description: The user drenches the foe in a special poisonous liquid. Its power doubles if the target is poisoned.

moves.name: Echoed Voice
moves.description: The user attacks the foe with an echoing voice. If this move is used every turn, it does greater damage.

moves.name: Hex
moves.description: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status problems.

moves.name: Power Gem
moves.description: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

moves.name: Scary Face
moves.description: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly reduce its Speed stat.

moves.name: Bug Bite
moves.description: The user bites the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

moves.name: Electro Ball
moves.description: The user hurls an electric orb at the foe. It does more damage the faster the user is.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.description: The target becomes trapped within a fierce vortex of fire that rages for four to five turns.

moves.name: Iron Defense
moves.description: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply raising its Defense stat.

moves.name: Body Press
moves.description: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. Power increases the higher the user's Defense is.

moves.name: Heavy Slam
moves.description: The user slams into the foe with its heavy body. The heavier the user, the greater the damage.

moves.name: High Horsepower
moves.description: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

moves.name: Play Rough
moves.description: The user plays rough with the target and attacks it. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

moves.name: Bide
moves.description: The user endures attacks for two turns, then strikes back to cause double the damage taken.

moves.name: Leech Life
moves.description: The user drains the target's blood. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

moves.name: Metal Claw
moves.description: The target is raked with steel claws. It may also raise the user's Attack stat.

moves.name: Poison Jab
moves.description: The target is stabbed with a tentacle or arm seeped with poison. It may also poison the target.

moves.name: Liquidation
moves.description: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. May lower the target's Defense.

moves.name: Zen Headbutt
moves.description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the foe. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Smack Down
moves.description: The user throws a stone or projectile to attack. A flying Pokémon will fall to the ground when hit.

moves.name: Icy Wind
moves.description: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. It also lowers the targets' Speed stat.

moves.name: Incinerate
moves.description: The user attacks the foe with fire. The target's held Berry becomes burnt up and unusable.

moves.name: Power-Up Punch
moves.description: Striking opponents repeatedly makes the user's fists harder, raising the user's Attack stat.

moves.name: Stored Power
moves.description: The user attacks with stored power. The more the user's stats are raised, the greater the damage.

moves.name: Sky Attack
moves.description: A second-turn attack move where critical hits land more easily. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Infestation
moves.description: The target is infested and unable to flee for four to five turns.

moves.name: Foul Play
moves.description: The user turns the foe's power against it. It does more damage the higher the target's Attack stat.

moves.name: Revenge
moves.description: An attack move that inflicts double the damage if the user has been hurt by the foe in the same turn.

moves.name: Curse
moves.description: A move that works differently for the Ghost type than for all the other types.

moves.name: Drill Peck
moves.description: A corkscrewing attack with the sharp beak acting as a drill.

moves.name: Knock Off
moves.description: The user slaps down the target's held item, preventing that item from being used in the battle.

moves.name: Headbutt
moves.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging into the foe. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Acid Armor
moves.description: The user alters its cellular structure to liquefy itself, sharply raising its Defense stat.

moves.name: Acid Spray
moves.description: The user spits fluid that works to melt the target. This harshly reduces the target's Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Agility
moves.description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. It sharply boosts the Speed stat.

moves.name: Air Cutter
moves.description: The user launches razor-like wind to slash the opposing team. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Air Slash
moves.description: The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Alluring Voice
moves.description: Attacks using an angelic voice. This confuses the target if its stats have been raised this turn.

moves.name: Ally Switch
moves.description: The user teleports using a strange power and switches its place with one of its allies.

moves.name: Amnesia
moves.description: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. It sharply raises the user's Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Ancient Power
moves.description: The user attacks with a prehistoric power. It may also raise all the user's stats at once.

moves.name: Aqua Ring
moves.description: The user envelops itself in a veil made of water. It regains some HP on every turn.

moves.name: Aqua Tail
moves.description: The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm.

moves.name: Assist
moves.description: The user hurriedly and randomly uses a move among those known by other Pokémon in the party.

moves.name: Assurance
moves.description: If the target has already taken some damage in the same turn, this attack's power is doubled.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: The user attacks the target while shouting in a startling fashion. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Aura Sphere
moves.description: The user looses a blast of aura power from deep within its body. This move is certain to hit.

moves.name: Aurora Beam
moves.description: The target is hit with a rainbow-colored beam. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

moves.name: Aurora Veil
moves.description: This move reduces damage from attacks for five turns. This can be used only in a hailstorm.

moves.name: Baby Doll Eyes
moves.description: The user stares with its baby-doll eyes, which lowers the target's Attack stat. Always goes first.

moves.name: Barrier
moves.description: The user throws up a sturdy wall that sharply raises its Defense stat.

moves.name: Baton Pass
moves.description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting, passing along any stat changes.

moves.name: Beat Up
moves.description: The user gets all the party Pokémon to attack the foe. The more party Pokémon, the more damage.

moves.name: Belly Drum
moves.description: The user maximizes its Attack stat in exchange for HP equal to half its max HP.

moves.name: Bestow
moves.description: The user passes its held item to the target when the target isn't holding an item.

moves.name: Bind
moves.description: Things such as long bodies or tentacles are used to bind and squeeze the foe for four to five turns.

moves.name: Bite
moves.description: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. It may make the target flinch.

moves.name: Blast Burn
moves.description: The target is razed by a fiery explosion. The user must rest on the next turn, however.

moves.name: Blaze Kick
moves.description: The user launches a kick with a high critical-hit ratio. It may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Block
moves.description: The user blocks the target's way with arms spread wide to prevent escape.

moves.name: Body Slam
moves.description: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight. It may leave the target with paralysis.

moves.name: Bounce
moves.description: The user bounces up high, then drops on the foe on the second turn. It may also paralyze the foe.

moves.name: Brave Bird
moves.description: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. The user also takes serious damage.

moves.name: Breaking Swipe
moves.description: The user swings its tough tail wildly and attacks all foes. This also lowers their Attack stats.

moves.name: Brutal Swing
moves.description: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

moves.name: Bullet Punch
moves.description: The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Burning Jealousy
moves.description: The user attacks with energy from jealousy. This burns all foes that had their stats boosted this turn.

moves.name: Captivate
moves.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the target is charmed into harshly lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Charm
moves.description: The user charmingly gazes at the foe, making it less wary. The target's Attack is harshly lowered.

moves.name: Chip Away
moves.description: Seeking an opening, the user strikes continually. The foe's stat changes don't affect the damage.

moves.name: Circle Throw
moves.description: The user throws the target and drags out another Pokémon in its party. In the wild, the battle ends.

moves.name: Clear Smog
moves.description: The user attacks by throwing a clump of special mud. All status changes are returned to normal.

moves.name: Confide
moves.description: The user tells the target a secret. The target loses focus and its Sp. Atk stat is lowered.

moves.name: Constrict
moves.description: The foe is attacked with long, creeping tentacles or vines. It may also lower the target's Speed.

moves.name: Corrosive Gas
moves.description: The user surrounds everything around it with highly acidic gas and melts away items they hold.

moves.name: Counter
moves.description: A retaliation move that counters any physical attack, inflicting double the damage taken.

moves.name: Covet
moves.description: The user endearingly approaches the target, then steals the target's held item.

moves.name: Cross Chop
moves.description: The user delivers a double chop with its forearms crossed. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Cross Poison
moves.description: A slashing attack with a poisonous blade that may also poison the foe. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Crunch
moves.description: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. It may also lower the target's Defense stat.

moves.name: Defense Curl
moves.description: The user curls up to conceal weak spots and raise its Defense stat.

moves.name: Destiny Bond
moves.description: When this move is used, if the user faints, the foe that landed the knockout hit also faints.

moves.name: Detect
moves.description: It enables the user to evade all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

moves.name: Disable
moves.description: For four turns, this move prevents the target from using the move it last used.

moves.name: Disarming Voice
moves.description: Letting out a charming cry, the user does emotional damage to foes. This attack never misses.

moves.name: Dizzy Punch
moves.description: The target is hit with rhythmically launched punches that may also leave it confused.

moves.name: Double Edge
moves.description: A reckless, life-risking tackle. It also damages the user by a fairly large amount, however.

moves.name: Draco Meteor
moves.description: Comets are summoned down from the sky. The attack's recoil harshly reduces the user's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Dragon Breath
moves.description: The user exhales a mighty gust that inflicts damage. It may also leave the target with paralysis.

moves.name: Dragon Dance
moves.description: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that boosts its Attack and Speed stats.

moves.name: Dragon Rush
moves.description: The user tackles the foe while exhibiting overwhelming menace. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Dragon Tail
moves.description: The user knocks away the target and drags out another Pokémon in its party. In the wild, the battle ends.

moves.name: Draining Kiss
moves.description: The user steals the target's HP with a kiss. The user's HP is restored by over half of the damage dealt.

moves.name: Drill Run
moves.description: The user crashes into its target while rotating its body like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Dual Wingbeat
moves.description: The user slams the target with its wings. The target is hit twice in a row.

moves.name: Dynamic Punch
moves.description: The user punches the target with full, concentrated power. It confuses the target if it hits.

moves.name: Earth Power
moves.description: The user makes the ground under the foe erupt with power. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def.

moves.name: Eerie Impulse
moves.description: The user's body generates an eerie impulse. Harshly lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Electroweb
moves.description: The user captures and attacks foes by using an electric net, which lowers their Speed stat.

moves.name: Embargo
moves.description: It prevents the target from using its held item. Its Trainer is also prevented from using items on it.

moves.name: Encore
moves.description: The user compels the target to keep using only the move it last used for three turns.

moves.name: Endeavor
moves.description: An attack move that cuts down the target's HP to equal the user's HP.

moves.name: Expanding Force
moves.description: The user attacks the target with psychic power. Powers up and hits all foes on Psychic Terrain.

moves.name: Explosion
moves.description: The user explodes to inflict damage on those around it. The user faints upon using this move.

moves.name: Extrasensory
moves.description: The user attacks with an odd, unseeable power. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Fairy Wind
moves.description: The user stirs up a fairy wind and strikes the target with it.

moves.name: Fake Out
moves.description: An attack that hits first and makes the target flinch. It only works the first turn the user is in battle.

moves.name: Fake Tears
moves.description: The user feigns crying to fluster the target, harshly lowering its Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Feather Dance
moves.description: The user covers the target's body with a mass of down that harshly lowers its Attack stat.

moves.name: Feint Attack
moves.description: The user draws up to the foe disarmingly, then throws a sucker punch. It hits without fail.

moves.name: Fire Fang
moves.description: The user bites with flame-cloaked fangs. It may also make the target flinch or leave it burned.

moves.name: Fire Lash
moves.description: The user strikes the target with a burning lash. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.

moves.name: Fire Pledge
moves.description: A column of fire hits opposing Pokémon. When used with its Grass equivalent, it makes a sea of fire.

moves.name: Fire Punch
moves.description: The target is punched with a fiery fist. It may leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: First Impression
moves.description: Although this move has great power, it only works the first turn the user is in battle.

moves.name: Flail
moves.description: The user flails about aimlessly to attack. It becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

moves.name: Flame Burst
moves.description: The user attacks the foe with a bursting flame. It also damages Pokémon next to the target.

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.description: The user cloaks itself in flame and attacks. Building up more power, it raises the user's Speed stat.

moves.name: Flare Blitz
moves.description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges at the foe. The user also takes damage and may burn the target.

moves.name: Flip Turn
moves.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

moves.name: Focus Energy
moves.description: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Follow Me
moves.description: The user draws attention to itself, making all targets take aim only at the user.

moves.name: Freeze Dry
moves.description: The user rapidly cools the target. This may freeze the target. Is super-effective on Water types.

moves.name: Frenzy Plant
moves.description: The user slams the target with an enormous tree. The user can't move on the next turn.

moves.name: Future Sight
moves.description: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

moves.name: Grass Pledge
moves.description: A column of grass hits the foes. When used with its water equivalent, it creates a vast swamp.

moves.name: Grassy Glide
moves.description: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.

moves.name: Gravity
moves.description: Gravity is intensified for five turns, making moves involving flying unusable and negating Levitation.

moves.name: Grudge
moves.description: If the user faints, the user's grudge fully depletes the PP of the foe's move that knocked it out.

moves.name: Guard Split
moves.description: The user employs its psychic power to average its Defense and Sp. Def stats with those of its target.

moves.name: Guard Swap
moves.description: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Defense and Sp. Def with the target.

moves.name: Gunk Shot
moves.description: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. It may also poison the target.

moves.name: Hammer Arm
moves.description: The user swings and hits with its strong and heavy fist. It lowers the user's Speed, however.

moves.name: Hardpress
moves.description: The target is crushed with great force. The attack is more powerful the more HP the target has left.

moves.name: Haze
moves.description: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.

moves.name: Head Smash
moves.description: The user attacks the foe with a hazardous, full-power headbutt. The user also takes terrible damage.

moves.name: Heal Bell
moves.description: The user makes a soothing bell chime to heal the status problems of all the party Pokémon.

moves.name: Heat Crash
moves.description: The user slams the foe with its flaming body. The heavier the user is, the greater the damage.

moves.name: Howl
moves.description: The user howls loudly to raise the spirit of itself and allies, boosting their Attack stats.

moves.name: Hurricane
moves.description: The user wraps its foe in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. It may also confuse the foe.

moves.name: Hydro Cannon
moves.description: The target is hit with a watery blast. The user must rest on the next turn, however.

moves.name: Hydro Pump
moves.description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

moves.name: Hyper Voice
moves.description: The user lets loose a horribly echoing shout with the power to inflict damage.

moves.name: Hypnosis
moves.description: The user employs hypnotic suggestion to make the target fall into a deep sleep.

moves.name: Ice Fang
moves.description: The user bites with cold-infused fangs. It may also make the target flinch or leave it frozen.

moves.name: Ice Punch
moves.description: The target is punched with an icy fist. It may also leave the target frozen.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.description: The user flash freezes chunks of ice and hurls them at the target. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Icicle Crash
moves.description: The user attacks by harshly dropping an icicle onto the foe. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Icicle Spear
moves.description: The user launches sharp icicles at the target. It strikes two to five times in a row.

moves.name: Imprison
moves.description: If the foe knows any move also known by the user, the foe is prevented from using it.

moves.name: Inferno
moves.description: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense fire. It leaves the target with a burn.

moves.name: Iron Head
moves.description: The foe slams the target with its steel-hard head. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Karate Chop
moves.description: The target is attacked with a sharp chop. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Laser Focus
moves.description: The user focuses intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

moves.name: Lash Out
moves.description: The user lashes out to vent its frustration. Power is doubled if its stats dropped this turn.

moves.name: Last Resort
moves.description: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

moves.name: Life Dew
moves.description: The user scatters mysterious water around and restores the HP of itself and its allies.

moves.name: Low Kick
moves.description: A powerful low kick that makes the foe fall over. It inflicts greater damage on heavier foes.

moves.name: Lucky Chant
moves.description: The user chants an incantation toward the sky, preventing the foe from landing critical hits.

moves.name: Lunge
moves.description: The user makes a lunge at the target, attacking with full force. This lowers the target's Attack stat.

moves.name: Mach Punch
moves.description: The user throws a punch at blinding speed. It is certain to strike first.

moves.name: Magic Room
moves.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's held items lose their effects for five turns.

moves.name: Magical Leaf
moves.description: The user scatters curious leaves that chase the target. This attack will not miss.

moves.name: Magnet Bomb
moves.description: The user launches steel bombs that stick to the target. This attack will not miss.

moves.name: Magnet Rise
moves.description: The user levitates using electrically generated magnetism for five turns.

moves.name: Me First
moves.description: The user tries to cut ahead of the foe to steal and use the foe's intended move with greater power.

moves.name: Mean Look
moves.description: The user pins the target with a dark, arresting look. The target becomes unable to flee.

moves.name: Meditate
moves.description: The user meditates to awaken the power deep within its body and raise its Attack stat.

moves.name: Mega Drain
moves.description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

moves.name: Memento
moves.description: The user faints when using this move. In return, it harshly lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk.

moves.name: Metal Sound
moves.description: A horrible sound like scraping metal harshly reduces the target's Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Meteor Beam
moves.description: Gathers space power and boosts its Sp. Atk stat on the first turn, attacks on the next turn.

moves.name: Meteor Mash
moves.description: The target is hit with a hard punch fired like a meteor. It may also raise the user's Attack.

moves.name: Metronome
moves.description: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.

moves.name: Mimic
moves.description: The user copies the move last used by the foe. The move can be used until the user is switched out.

moves.name: Minimize
moves.description: The user compresses its body to make itself look smaller, which sharply raises its evasiveness.

moves.name: Miracle Eye
moves.description: Enables the user to hit a Dark type with any type of move. It also enables the user to hit an evasive foe.

moves.name: Mirror Coat
moves.description: A retaliation move that counters any special attack, inflicting double the damage taken.

moves.name: Mist
moves.description: The user cloaks its body with a white mist that prevents any of its stats from being cut for five turns.

moves.name: Misty Explosion
moves.description: The user attacks everything around and faints upon using this move. Power increases on Misty Terrain.

moves.name: Moonblast
moves.description: The user attacks by borrowing the power of the moon. This may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Mud Bomb
moves.description: The user launches a hard-packed mud ball to attack. It may also lower the target's accuracy.

moves.name: Mud Shot
moves.description: The user attacks by hurling a blob of mud at the target. It also reduces the target's Speed.

moves.name: Muddy Water
moves.description: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at the opposing team. It may also lower the target's accuracy.

moves.name: Mudslap
moves.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

moves.name: Natural Gift
moves.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

moves.name: Nature Power
moves.description: An attack that makes use of nature's power. Its effects vary depending on the user's environment.

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.description: The user slashes the target the instant an opportunity arises. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Nightshade
moves.description: The user makes the foe see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage matching the user's level.

moves.name: Ominous Wind
moves.description: The user blasts the target with a gust of repulsive wind. It may also raise all the user's stats at once.

moves.name: Outrage
moves.description: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. It then becomes confused, however.

moves.name: Parting Shot
moves.description: With a parting threat, the user lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats. Then it switches out.

moves.name: Phantom Force
moves.description: The user vanishes somewhere, then strikes on the next turn. Hits through protections.

moves.name: Pin Missile
moves.description: Sharp spikes are shot at the target in rapid succession. They hit two to five times in a row.

moves.name: Poison Fang
moves.description: The user bites the target with toxic fangs. It may also leave the target badly poisoned.

moves.name: Poltergeist
moves.description: Attacks the target by controlling its item. The move fails if the target doesn't have an item.

moves.name: Power Split
moves.description: The user employs its psychic power to average its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with those of the target.

moves.name: Power Swap
moves.description: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Attack and Sp. Atk with the target.

moves.name: Power Trick
moves.description: The user employs its psychic power to switch its Attack with its Defense stat.

moves.name: Power Trip
moves.description: The user boasts of its strength. Power increases the more the user's stats are raised.

moves.name: Power Whip
moves.description: The user violently whirls its vines or tentacles to harshly lash the target.

moves.name: Psybeam
moves.description: The target is attacked with a peculiar ray. It may also cause confusion.

moves.name: Psychic Fangs
moves.description: The user bites the target using psychic capabilities. This can also destroy Light Screen and Reflect.

moves.name: Psychic Noise
moves.description: Attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. Prevents the target from healing for two turns.

moves.name: Psycho Cut
moves.description: The user tears at the target with blades formed by psychic power. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Psyshock
moves.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

moves.name: Pursuit
moves.description: An attack move that inflicts double damage if used on a target that is switching out of battle.

moves.name: Quash
moves.description: The user suppresses the target and makes its move go last.

moves.name: Quiver Dance
moves.description: The user performs a beautiful dance. It boosts the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

moves.name: Recycle
moves.description: The user recycles a held item that has been used in battle so it can be used again.

moves.name: Refresh
moves.description: The user rests to cure itself of a poisoning, burn, or paralysis.

moves.name: Retaliate
moves.description: Gets revenge for a fainted ally. If an ally fainted in the last turn, this attack's damage increases.

moves.name: Reversal
moves.description: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

moves.name: Rising Voltage
moves.description: The user attacks with electric voltage rising from the ground. Power is doubled on Electric Terrain.

moves.name: Rock Throw
moves.description: The user picks up and throws a small rock at the target to attack.

moves.name: Rollout
moves.description: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. It becomes stronger each time it hits.

moves.name: Round
moves.description: The user attacks with a song. Others can join in the Round and make the attack do greater damage.

moves.name: Sand Attack
moves.description: Sand is hurled in the target's face, reducing its accuracy.

moves.name: Scale Shot
moves.description: Attacks by shooting scales two to five times in a row. Boosts the user's Speed but lowers its Defense.

moves.name: Scorching Sands
moves.description: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also burn the target.

moves.name: Screech
moves.description: An earsplitting screech harshly reduces the target's Defense stat.

moves.name: Secret Power
moves.description: The user attacks with a secret power. Its added effects vary depending on the user's environment.

moves.name: Seed Bomb
moves.description: The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

moves.name: Seismic Toss
moves.description: The target is thrown using the power of gravity. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

moves.name: Shadow Punch
moves.description: The user throws a punch from the shadows. The punch lands without fail.

moves.name: Signal Beam
moves.description: The user attacks with a sinister beam of light. It may also confuse the target.

moves.name: Silver Wind
moves.description: The foe is attacked with powdery scales blown by wind. It may also raise all the user's stats.

moves.name: Skitter Smack
moves.description: The user skitters behind the target to attack. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Slam
moves.description: The target is slammed with a long tail, vines, etc., to inflict damage.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: The target is attacked with a slash of claws or blades. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Sludge
moves.description: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target. It may also poison the target.

moves.name: Sludge Wave
moves.description: It swamps the area around the user with a giant sludge wave. It may also poison those hit.

moves.name: Smart Strike
moves.description: The user stabs the target with a sharp horn. This attack never misses.

moves.name: Snatch
moves.description: The user steals the effects of any healing or stat-changing move the foe attempts to use.

moves.name: Snore
moves.description: An attack that can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Softboiled
moves.description: The user restores its own HP by up to half of its maximum HP. May also be used in the field to heal HP.

moves.name: Solar Blade
moves.description: The user gathers light energy into a blade, attacking the target on the next turn.

moves.name: Spikes
moves.description: The user lays a trap of spikes at the foe's feet. The trap hurts foes that switch into battle.

moves.name: Spite
moves.description: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the foe. The trap hurts foes that switch into battle.

moves.name: Steel Beam
moves.description: The user fires a beam of steel that it collected from its entire body. This also damages the user.

moves.name: Steel Roller
moves.description: The user attacks while destroying the terrain. This move fails when the ground isn't a terrain.

moves.name: Stomp
moves.description: The target is stomped with a big foot. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Strength Sap
moves.description: The user restores its HP by the target's Attack stat amount. Then lowers the target's Attack stat.

moves.name: String Shot
moves.description: The foe is bound with silk blown from the user's mouth. This silk reduces the target's Speed.

moves.name: Struggle Bug
moves.description: While resisting, the user attacks the opposing Pokémon. The targets' Sp. Atk stat is reduced.

moves.name: Submission
moves.description: The user grabs the target and recklessly dives for the ground. It also hurts the user slightly.

moves.name: Sucker Punch
moves.description: This move enables the user to attack first. It fails if the target is not readying an attack, however.

moves.name: Super Fang
moves.description: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. It cuts the target's HP to half.

moves.name: Superpower
moves.description: The user attacks the target with great power. However, it also lowers the user's Attack and Defense.

moves.name: Synthesis
moves.description: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

moves.name: Tail Slap
moves.description: The user attacks by striking the target with its hard tail. It hits the Pokémon two to five times in a row.

moves.name: Tailwind
moves.description: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that ups the Speed of all party Pokémon for four turns.

moves.name: Take Down
moves.description: A reckless, full-body charge attack for slamming into the foe. It also damages the user a little.

moves.name: Taunt
moves.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

moves.name: Telekinesis
moves.description: The user makes the target float with its psychic power. The target is easier to hit for three turns.

moves.name: Terrain Pulse
moves.description: Utilizes the power of the terrain to attack. This move's type and power vary with the terrain.

moves.name: Throat Chop
moves.description: The user attacks the target's throat. The target cannot use sound-based moves for two turns.

moves.name: Thunder Fang
moves.description: The user bites with electrified fangs. It may also make the target flinch or leave it with paralysis.

moves.name: Thunder Punch
moves.description: The target is punched with an electrified fist. It may also leave the target with paralysis.

moves.name: Toxic Spikes
moves.description: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the foe's feet. They poison foes that switch into battle.

moves.name: Trailblaze
moves.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. This boosts the user's Speed stat.

moves.name: Tri Attack
moves.description: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. May also paralyze, burn, or freeze the target.

moves.name: Trick
moves.description: The user catches the target off guard and swaps its held item with its own.

moves.name: Triple Axel
moves.description: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.

moves.name: Twister
moves.description: The user whips up a vicious tornado to tear at the opposing team. It may also make targets flinch.

moves.name: Volt Tackle
moves.description: The user electrifies itself, then charges at the foe. It causes considerable damage to the user as well.

moves.name: Water Pledge
moves.description: A column of water strikes the target. When combined with its fire equivalent, it makes a rainbow.

moves.name: Weather Ball
moves.description: An attack move that varies in power and type depending on the weather.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.description: Traps foes in a violent swirling whirlpool for four to five turns.

moves.name: Wide Guard
moves.description: The user and its allies are protected from wide-ranging attacks for a turn. May fail if used in succession.

moves.name: Wild Charge
moves.description: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its foe. It also damages the user a little.

moves.name: Wonder Room
moves.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped for 5 turns.

moves.name: Worry Seed
moves.description: A seed that causes worry is planted on the foe. It prevents sleep by making its Ability Insomnia.

moves.name: Worry Seed
moves.description: A seed that causes worry is planted on the foe. It prevents sleep by making its Ability Insomnia.

moves.name: Yawn
moves.description: The user lets loose a huge yawn that lulls the target into falling asleep on the next turn.
